title: Update landing page intro text for AD TRIBE

requirements.text: Update the opening landing page (LandingPage.tsx) to display the full AD TRIBE intro paragraph: 'AD Tribe is a smart networking and project coordination app built exclusively for advertising professionals. Designed for the fast-paced world of advertising, AD Tribe transforms scattered coordination into a unified, efficient workflow—helping creative teams move faster, stay aligned, and deliver outstanding campaigns.' This text should appear prominently beneath the AD TRIBE logo/headline in the hero section, replacing or supplementing any existing subheadline copy.

quotes: AD Tribe is a smart networking and project coordination app built exclusively for advertising professionals. Designed for the fast-paced world of advertising, AD Tribe transforms scattered coordination into a unified, efficient workflow—helping creative teams move faster, stay aligned, and deliver outstanding campaigns

acceptanceCriteria: The landing page hero section displays the full intro paragraph verbatim as provided by the user.
The intro text is legible and styled consistently with the existing AD TRIBE amber/charcoal design theme.
The AD TRIBE logo/headline remains visible above the intro text.
No other landing page content or layout is broken by this change.

constraints: Do not alter backend logic or data models.
Do not modify immutable frontend paths (hooks, main.tsx, ui components).
Preserve the existing amber/charcoal/gold visual theme and typography.
nonGoals: Changing the overall landing page layout beyond updating the intro text.
